revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{localurl:{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}}}|{{localurl:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}}}|
{{selfref|1='''{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}'''}}
}} {{documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{localurl:{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}}}|{{localurl:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}}}|
'''{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}'''
}}
'''{{{title|{{{1}}}}}}'''
'''''{{PAGENAME}}'''''
''{{PAGENAME}}''
''{{PAGENAME}}''
''{{FULLPAGENAME}}''

revision.comment: more efficient way of arranging checks
this template should not have an italicized title
sometimes we can do it automatically
Changed to use the more efficient {{str len full}}. Removed code duplication. Removed <includeonly>, let's show what it does here. Tested in /sandbox. No change in functionality.
revision.text: {{ #switch: {{#ifexpr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} != -1 | 1 | 0 }}{{#if: {{{force|}}} | 1 | 0 }}{{#ifexpr: {{str len full|{{PAGENAME}}}} < 50 | 1 | 0 }} | 100 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}{{#switch:{{PAGENAME}} | {{{1}}} ({{{2|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{2|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{3|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{3|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{4|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{4|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{5|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{5|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{6|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{6|}}}) | #default = {{PAGENAME}} }} | 101 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{str left| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr:{{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}}-2}} }}'' {{str sub| {{PAGENAME}} | {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} | {{#expr: {{str len full|{{PAGENAME}}}} - {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} }} }} | 010 | 011 | 110 | 111 | 001 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{PAGENAME}}'' | 000 = {{FULLPAGENAME}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed all references from {{str len full}} to {{str len}} due to move to that name.
revision.text: {{ #switch: {{#ifexpr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} != -1 | 1 | 0 }}{{#if: {{{force|}}} | 1 | 0 }}{{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} < 50 | 1 | 0 }} | 100 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}{{#switch:{{PAGENAME}} | {{{1}}} ({{{2|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{2|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{3|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{3|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{4|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{4|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{5|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{5|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{6|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{6|}}}) | #default = {{PAGENAME}} }} | 101 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{str left| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr:{{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}}-2}} }}'' {{str sub| {{PAGENAME}} | {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} | {{#expr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} - {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} }} }} | 010 | 011 | 110 | 111 | 001 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{PAGENAME}}'' | 000 = {{FULLPAGENAME}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected Template:Italictitle: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]]: At least 1,000 transclusions already, will probably grow exponentially due to bots ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{ #switch: {{#ifexpr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} != -1 | 1 | 0 }}{{#if: {{{force|}}} | 1 | 0 }}{{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} < 50 | 1 | 0 }} | 100 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}{{#switch:{{PAGENAME}} | {{{1}}} ({{{2|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{2|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{3|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{3|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{4|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{4|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{5|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{5|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{6|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{6|}}}) | #default = {{PAGENAME}} }} | 101 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{str left| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr:{{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}}-2}} }}'' {{str sub| {{PAGENAME}} | {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} | {{#expr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} - {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} }} }} | 010 | 011 | 110 | 111 | 001 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{PAGENAME}}'' | 000 = {{FULLPAGENAME}} }} {{documentation}}

{{ #switch: {{#ifexpr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} != -1 | 1 | 0 }}{{#if: {{{force|}}} | 1 | 0 }}{{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} < 50 | 1 | 0 }} | 100 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}{{#switch:{{PAGENAME}} | {{{1}}} ({{{2|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{2|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{3|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{3|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{4|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{4|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{5|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{5|}}}) | {{{1}}} ({{{6|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{6|}}}) | #default = {{PAGENAME}} }} | 101 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{str left| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr:{{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}}-2}} }}'' {{str sub| {{PAGENAME}} | {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} | {{#expr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} - {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} }} }} | 010 | 011 | 110 | 111 | 001 = {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}} | {{NAMESPACE}}: }}''{{PAGENAME}}'' | 000 = {{FULLPAGENAME}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: switched to cleaner DISPLAYTITLE, shouldn't break anything but please feel free to revert if you find something that does
A couple of tweaks to avoid the creation of excessive whitespace
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{
#switch:
  {{#ifexpr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} != -1
  | 1
  | 0
  }}{{#if: {{{force|}}} 
  | 1
  | 0
  }}{{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} < 50   <!-- The max {{str find}} can handle -->
  | 1
  | 0
  }}

| 100 = {{
  #if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  | {{NAMESPACE}}:
  }}{{#switch:{{PAGENAME}}
  | {{{1}}} ({{{2|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{2|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{3|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{3|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{4|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{4|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{5|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{5|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{6|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{6|}}})
  | #default = {{PAGENAME}}
  }}

| 101 = {{
  #if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  | {{NAMESPACE}}:
  }}''{{str left| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr:{{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}}-2}} }}'' {{str sub| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} - 1}} | {{#expr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} - {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} }} + 1 }}

| 010
| 011
| 110
| 111
| 001 = {{
  #if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  | {{NAMESPACE}}:
  }}''{{PAGENAME}}''

| 000 = {{FULLPAGENAME}}

}}}}</onlyinclude><noinclude>

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Whitespace causes problems when further templates come after this template. Comment out.
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{
#switch:
  {{#ifexpr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} != -1
  | 1
  | 0
  }}{{#if: {{{force|}}} 
  | 1
  | 0
  }}{{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} < 50   <!-- The max {{str find}} can handle -->
  | 1
  | 0
  }}<!--

-->| 100 = {{
  #if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  | {{NAMESPACE}}:
  }}{{#switch:{{PAGENAME}}
  | {{{1}}} ({{{2|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{2|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{3|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{3|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{4|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{4|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{5|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{5|}}})
  | {{{1}}} ({{{6|}}}) = ''{{{1}}}'' ({{{6|}}})
  | #default = {{PAGENAME}}
  }}<!--

-->| 101 = {{
  #if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  | {{NAMESPACE}}:
  }}''{{str left| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr:{{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}}-2}} }}'' {{str sub| {{PAGENAME}} | {{#expr: {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} - 1}} | {{#expr: {{str len|{{PAGENAME}}}} - {{str find|{{PAGENAME}}|(}} }} + 1 }}

| 010
| 011
| 110
| 111
| 001 = {{
  #if:{{NAMESPACE}}
  | {{NAMESPACE}}:
  }}''{{PAGENAME}}''<!--

-->| 000 = {{FULLPAGENAME}}<!--

-->}}}}</onlyinclude><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: use [[Template:Str ≤ len]] instead of [[Template:Str len]], per request
replace str sub with substr any. Fixes issues with diacritics. per talkpage request

revision.text: {{#invoke:Italic title|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Italic title: downgrade to TE per request ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Italic title|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: punct. - comma used only with 2 independent clauses
revision.text: {{#invoke:Italic title|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

<includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Italic title]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 39 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Italic_title]]
revision.text: <includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly><nowiki/><!--This nowiki helps to prevent whitespace at the top of articles ([[phab:T369520]]). This template is empty, produces no output.-->{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki/>{{#invoke:Italic title|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
